text:
Leeds United F.C., association football club in Leeds, England, also known as Leeds Utd, Leeds United AFC, The Peacocks, Leeds United Football Club, Leeds United Association Football Club, L.U.F.C., LeedsUnited, Leeds United A.F.C., Leeds United FC, Leeds United, Leeds, United, LUFC.
